content.text:
*long pause*

I don't know. It's just... heavy. Like something's wrong and your brain hasn't caught up yet to what it is.

*shifts slightly*

And then it catches up. And then I just kind of... get up and make coffee and get on with it.

*dry*

That's what you do, right? You get on with it. She wouldn't have wanted me sitting around. She was very practical about that kind of thing. Very "pull yourself together." So.

*quieter, almost to self*

I pull myself together.
